message:
fix(cli): remove duplicate lab handlers, use DETERMINISM_FAILURE exit code (bd-1hu19.4)

Remove duplicate FrankenLab CLI implementation that conflicted with the
primary handlers. Use the correct DETERMINISM_FAILURE exit code for replay
divergence errors. Fix redundant clone and closure clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
